1.name: Divine Sense
1.description: Action: detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft (not behind total cover). Also detects consecrated/desecrated ground. Uses = 1 + CHA mod per long rest.

1.name: Lay on Hands
1.description: Touch to restore HP from a pool of Paladin level × 5. Or spend 5 HP to cure one disease or neutralize one poison. Restores on long rest.

2.name: Fighting Style
2.description: Choose: Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, or Protection.

2.name: Spellcasting
2.description: Prepare CHA mod + half Paladin level spells from the paladin list. Cast using Charisma.

2.name: Divine Smite
2.description: On a hit with a melee weapon, expend a spell slot to deal 2d8 + 1d8 per slot level above 1st radiant damage. Extra 1d8 vs undead/fiends. Double dice on a critical hit.

3.name: Sacred Oath
3.description: Choose a subclass oath: Devotion, Ancients, Vengeance, Conquest, Redemption, Glory, Watchers, or Oathbreaker.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

6.name: Aura of Protection
6.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft add your CHA modifier (min +1) to saving throws while you are conscious. Range increases to 30 ft at level 18.

10.name: Aura of Courage
10.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 ft can't be frightened while you are conscious. Range increases to 30 ft at level 18.

11.name: Improved Divine Smite
11.description: Whenever you hit with a melee weapon, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

14.name: Cleansing Touch
14.description: Action: end one spell on yourself or a willing creature you touch. Uses = CHA mod (min 1) per long rest.
